activeGoal: 适配测试环境变更：OPENCODE 后台服务已迁移到 Docker 容器，当前代理运行在 WSL 中，应通过 http://localhost:8123 访问 OPENCODE SERVER；更新相关代码或配置以匹配该连接方式。

tasks.title: 适配测试环境变更：OPENCODE 后台服务已迁移到 Docker 容器，当前代理运行在 WSL 中，应通过 http://localhost:8123 访问 OPENCODE SERVER；更新相关代码或配置以匹配该连接方式。
tasks.summary: Completed fast-track WSL-to-Docker OPENCODE endpoint adaptation. Updated Python adapter default OPENCODE base URL, probe script fallback, environment examples, and docs to http://localhost:8123 while preserving OPENCODE_BASE_URL overrides. Added regression assertions for the new default and verified related python_adapter tests passed.
tasks.details: Completed fast-track WSL-to-Docker OPENCODE endpoint adaptation. qa.summary: QA passed for fast-track TASK-072 on commit 750372b736aa83295bad4c637b9d5637de0bff48. Verified commit files align with WSL-to-Docker localhost:8123 adaptation scope: docs, .env example, adapter config default, probe fallback, and regression tests. Re-ran targeted pytest suite for config/app/adapter plus lightweight probe-script tests; all passed (20 tests total). Noted current working tree is dirty in unrelated files outside python_adapter/docs scope, but HEAD matches reviewed commit and no reviewed-scope files differ from the commit. Architecture traceability remains unmapped for TASK-072 and should be improved later, but this does not block this fast-track validation.
